creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Mon Feb 11 12:18:03 2013
New Revision: 312056
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312056

Log:
  - Update 0.5.1
  
  PR:	ports/175891
  Submitted by:	Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/awscli/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/awscli/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/awscli/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/awscli/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/awscli/Makefile	Mon Feb 11 11:39:30 2013	(r312055)
+++ head/devel/awscli/Makefile	Mon Feb 11 12:18:03 2013	(r312056)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	awscli
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.4
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=source/a/awscli
@@ -13,10 +13,10 @@ COMMENT=	Universal Command Line Interfac
 LICENSE=	AL2
 LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/LICENSE.txt
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}botocore>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-botocore \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}six>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-six \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sphinx>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-sphinx \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}tox>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-tox
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}botocore>=0.5.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-botocore \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}six>=1.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-six \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sphinx>=1.1.3:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-sphinx \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}tox>=1.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-tox
 
 USE_PYTHON=	2.6+
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install

Modified: head/devel/awscli/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/awscli/distinfo	Mon Feb 11 11:39:30 2013	(r312055)
+++ head/devel/awscli/distinfo	Mon Feb 11 12:18:03 2013	(r312056)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (awscli-0.4.4.tar.gz) = 721eb3188dbc9bbbdb287d40327e8238a33f20d36edaa7874b0543fbdf858f9d
-SIZE (awscli-0.4.4.tar.gz) = 14759
+SHA256 (awscli-0.5.1.tar.gz) = 941f056b5dedd51d5de7ffc9c8a01f58137bd498dd4a53e49d23a98ab05b30ea
+SIZE (awscli-0.5.1.tar.gz) = 16872

==============================================================================
--- head/devel/awscli/pkg-plist	Mon Feb 11 11:39:30 2013	(r312055)
+++ head/devel/awscli/pkg-plist	Mon Feb 11 12:18:03 2013	(r312056)
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 bin/aws
 bin/aws.cmd
 bin/aws_completer
+bin/zsh_complete.sh
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/PKG-INFO
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/SOURCES.txt
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/dependency_links.txt
@@ -9,6 +10,7 @@ bin/aws_completer
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/scripts/aws
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/scripts/aws.cmd
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/scripts/aws_completer
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/scripts/zsh_complete.sh
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/top_level.txt
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/awscli/__init__.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/awscli/__init__.pyc
